advancements.hotsteel.crude_steel.descri: Smelt your very first Crude Steel. Looks a bit rough, honestly.
advancements.hotsteel.crude_steel.title: Is This... Steel?
advancements.hotsteel.full_armor.descrip: Suit up in a full set of Hot Steel armor. Lava? Never heard of her.
advancements.hotsteel.full_armor.title: Burn, Blazing Steel!
advancements.hotsteel.hot_steel_hoe.desc: Craft a Hot Steel Hoe. The mod's best material... on a hoe. Respect.
advancements.hotsteel.hot_steel_ingot.de: Get your first Hot Steel Ingot. Yeow — do NOT grab that bare-handed.
advancements.hotsteel.steel_ingot.descri: Get your first Steel Ingot. Shiny, fireproof, and totally useless... for now.
advancements.hotsteel.steel_ingot.title: Ooh, a Steel Ingot!
